module_description: Amethyst is a placeholder/stub module with minimal structure containing only a justfile that imports the shared library with no recipe implementations.

violations.title: Missing shell settings in justfile
violations.description: Justfile does not define required shell settings. Must add: set shell := ["bash", "-euo", "pipefail", "-c"]
violations.expected: Shell settings defined at top of justfile
violations.remediation: Add shell configuration after import statement per ADR-002 section 2

violations.title: No standard recipes implemented
violations.description: Module must implement standard recipes or null implementations per ADR-002 section 6
violations.expected: Recipes: install, clean, mktree, health, ls, completions, build, template, test
violations.remediation: Implement all standard recipes, using null implementations where not applicable (per ADR-002 section 6)

violations.title: Recipes not organized into standardized groups
violations.description: All recipes must be organized into standardized groups using [group()] attribute
violations.expected: Recipes organized into: lifecycle, info, build, service (if applicable)
violations.remediation: Organize recipes with [group("lifecycle")], [group("info")], [group("build")] attributes per ADR-002 section 7

violations.title: Deprecated .meta.json file present
violations.description: The .meta.json pattern is deprecated for new modules per ADR-003
violations.actual: Deprecated .meta.json file present with TODO status
violations.remediation: Remove /private/etc/dotfiles/adam/amethyst/.meta.json and .todo directory per ADR-003 section 3

recommendations: Implement justfile shell settings and all standard recipes as top priority (ADR-002)
When configuration is added to the module, ensure compliance with ADR-004, ADR-005, and ADR-006
If module becomes a service module, ensure compliance with ADR-007
